name: Breweries
rationale: Weakest composite: low fit (4.93) and lowest incumbent vulnerability (4.50) since cheap turbine sensors in glycol service are accepted and budgeted as consumables. CIP position requires food-contact cert. (medium, 6-12 months), pushing addressable entry to glycol-only loops.
entryStrategy: 1) Target mid-size craft/regional breweries (50k-500k hl/yr) with multi-fermenter glycol loops. 2) Prove zero-maintenance vs. turbine over 18-month trial. 3) Enter glycol-only; defer CIP until FDA 21 CFR 177 cert. funded. 4) Channel via brewery-equipment integrators (GEA, Ziemann, Krones). 5) Scale via retrofit kits.
